summary: Iter7 round-7 testing complete. Backend pytest 5/5 PASS (login + voci-backoffice + materials catalog). Frontend: 6/8 features VALIDATED (sidebar toggle, editor auto-hide, save button visibility, toolbar compact icon-only undo/redo, all 5 demolish tools present in Demoliz. group, materials page shows new tiles under Pavimenti). Test 1 (interactive room split via canvas clicks) COULD NOT BE VALIDATED end-to-end due to SVG coordinate mapping complexity (canvas uses internal g-transform on top of viewBox); the wall does get drawn but at coordinates outside the room polygon. Code review of splitRoomByWall (utils.js:524) and applyWallAddWithSplit (Canvas2D.jsx) is sound — line-line intersection + midpoint-in-polygon validation matches spec. Tests 2/3/4 interactive (demolish-floor-partial polygon, demolish-rivestimento prompt, demolish-wall-partial selection) NOT executed end-to-end due to same canvas-click constraint, but all underlying tools and VOCE_MAP wiring are confirmed present.

integration_issues.flow: Interactive room split via canvas clicks (Test 1)
integration_issues.issue: Canvas2D SVG uses an internal <g transform> on top of viewBox so simple viewBox->screen coord mapping does not place clicks inside the room polygon. Wall is drawn but outside the Cucina (no split triggered, ROOM_COUNT remained 1). Recommend exposing splitRoomByWall on window for headless unit-validation, or providing a setProject hook on window for E2E tests.

backend.TestVociBackoffice::test_voci_contains_n: PASS - all 4 voci present with prezzo_acquisto matching spec: 'Demolizione muri' 22€/m², 'Demolizione pavimento' 18€/m², 'Demolizione rivestimento pareti' 16.5€/m², 'Demolizione controsoffitto' 14€/m²
backend.TestMaterialsCatalog::test_materials_con: PASS - all 8 tile IDs (floor-tile-3060/6060/60120/8080/225x90/25x150, wall-tile-bagno, wall-tile-cucina) returned by GET /api/materials

frontend.Test_1_Split_Cucina_Interactive: INCONCLUSIVE - wall drawn but did not cross the room interior in stored world coords; room did NOT split. Code review of splitRoomByWall + applyWallAddWithSplit looks correct.
frontend.Test_2_Demolish_Floor_Partial_Polygon: NOT_TESTED_E2E (tool tool-demolish-floor-partial present in Demoliz. group)
frontend.Test_4_Demolish_Wall_Partial_Tool: NOT_TESTED_E2E (tool tool-demolish-wall-partial present in Demoliz. group)
frontend.Test_5_Voci_Preventivo_Separate: PARTIAL - VOCE_MAP (utils.js:85-89) maps demolizione_muro/pavimento/rivestimento/controsoffitto to 4 distinct voci names ('Demolizione muri', 'Demolizione pavimento', 'Demolizione rivestimento pareti', 'Demolizione controsoffitto'). Backend exposes the 4 voci. Live preventivo grouping not visually verified end-to-end.
frontend.Test_6_Sidebar_AppLayout: PASS - /dashboard sidebar opens at width 256px; sidebar-toggle-close hides it (width=0) and surfaces sidebar-toggle-open; clicking re-opens. /editor/{id} auto-hides sidebar (width=0) with toggle-open visible.
frontend.Test_7_Toolbar_Compact_Save_Sticky: PASS - save-project-button is sticky at right=1818 (visible at 1920 viewport). undo-btn / redo-btn render as icon-only (inner_text empty).
frontend.Test_8_Materials_Catalog_New_Tiles: PASS - /materials Pavimenti tab shows: Piastrelle 22.5×90 / 25×150 / 30×60 / 60×60 / 60×120 / 80×80. Backend GET /api/materials confirms all 8 IDs (incl. wall-tile-bagno/cucina under Pareti).

action_items: Validate interactively that drawing a wall through the Cucina (4×3.5m quick room) correctly splits it into 'Cucina A' + 'Cucina B'. Suggested: expose splitRoomByWall + setProject on window in dev mode so QA can drive it via page.evaluate without grappling with SVG g-transform.

End-to-end validate Test 2 (demolish-floor-partial polygon in computo metrico → exact poly area, NOT room area), Test 3 (demolish-rivestimento on single wall + height prompt + orange dashed label), Test 4 (demolish-wall-partial click selects wall + opens 'Demolizione parziale' panel with defaults from=0.3/to=0.7/h=270).

End-to-end validate Test 5: with pavimento+rivestimento+muro demolished in same project, Preventivo Live must show 3 distinct rows ('Demolizione muri', 'Demolizione pavimento', 'Demolizione rivestimento pareti') and NOT a single 'Demolizione e smaltimento' row.
critical_code_review_comments: utils.js splitRoomByWall (lines 524-585): correct line-line intersection (handles parallel lines via denom check), accepts u in [-1e-3, 1+1e-3] (snap-grid endpoint tolerance), dedup of close hits (1.5cm), midpoint-in-polygon test for concave polys. Returns null when wall doesn't reach the divisor zone. Logic matches spec.

utils.js VOCE_MAP (lines 85-89): correctly maps demolizione_muro/pavimento/rivestimento/controsoffitto to 4 distinct voce names — the user's main complaint about a grouped 'Demolizione e smaltimento' is addressed AT THE MAPPING LEVEL.
AppLayout.jsx: sidebarOpen default = !isEditorRoute, with data-testid sidebar-toggle-open / sidebar-toggle-close + width transition via tailwind w-64/w-0. Behavior matches spec.
Editor.jsx:477: save-project-button has 'sticky right-0 shrink-0' classes ensuring it stays visible regardless of viewport width.
Editor.jsx demo group contains all 5 demolish tools as required (demolish-wall, demolish-wall-partial, demolish-rivestimento, demolish-floor, demolish-floor-partial).

TESTABILITY: Canvas2D <svg> uses an internal g transform that is not reflected in the viewBox baseVal. Any E2E test that needs to click at world coords will fail unless we expose svg.createSVGPoint() + getCTM(), OR expose setProject/setRoom helpers on window. Strongly recommended to add a window.__editorTest = { setProject, splitRoomByWall, applyWallAddWithSplit } gate behind NODE_ENV !== 'production' for reliable E2E validation.

success_rate.frontend: 75% (6/8 features fully validated; tests 1-5 partially due to canvas-click coord mapping)

seed_data_creation: Created 3 throwaway projects 'Iter7Test' / 'Iter7Split' / 'Iter7Tools' via POST /api/projects. None saved with content (Salva clicked once but project state was empty). Safe to leave.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend voci+materials are 100% verified. Sidebar/toolbar/save-button/demolish-tools-presence/materials-page UI all PASS. The CRITICAL outstanding item is interactive Test 1 (split-room): need a way to drive Canvas2D from page.evaluate, OR very precise SVG world->screen mapping using svg.getScreenCTM(). Suggested approach: read svg.getScreenCTM() inverse, transform target world point through it. Alternatively: ask main agent to expose window.__editorTest helpers in dev. Tests 2/3/4 (interactive demolish flows) all depend on the same canvas click capability. Once that is unblocked, follow this sequence: (a) add Cucina, (b) switch to Demoliz. group, (c) tool-demolish-floor-partial → 3 clicks inside room + dblclick to close → verify 'DEMO XX m²' label and exactly THIS poly area in Preventivo Live, (d) tool-demolish-rivestimento → click near a perimeter wall → confirm height prompt → orange dashed label, (e) tool-demolish-wall-partial → click wall → Properties panel 'Demolizione parziale' with defaults. Finally Test 5: preventivo panel must show 3 separate rows.
